ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: How often have you heard that transgender people are ''not normal''?
How often have you had to pretend that you are a gender other than the gender you identify with, in order to be accepted?
How often have you been told that transgender people will end up unhappy and alone?
How often have you felt your family was hurt and embarrassed because you are transgender?
How often have you felt you had to stop associating with your family because you are transgender?
How often have you felt uncomfortable using locker rooms, restrooms, or other public facilities based on your transgender identity?
How often have you felt unsafe at school because you are transgender?
How often have you felt discriminated against at school because you are transgender?
How often have you felt and liked at school because you are transgender?
